name: _outliner
description: Shared tree-sitter outliner used by the read and search pi extensions.
//: tree-sitter versions are pinned deliberately — do NOT bump without testing on the DGX Spark (ARM64), which is the primary deployment target:
tree-sitter 0.21.x: newer runtimes (0.22.x, 0.25.x) build on macOS/Node 24 but fail on the Spark, so we stay on the 0.21 line.
tree-sitter-typescript 0.20.5: 0.23.x has a node-gyp build bug; 0.20.5 is the last release that builds cleanly on the Spark.
Native modules need C++20 to compile on Node 24+ (cppgc headers) — setup.sh passes CXXFLAGS=-std=c++20 during npm install.
